overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage showing a character in a long leather coat walking through a modern urban environment. The scene transitions from a grassy corridor between contemporary glass buildings to a paved waterfront promenade with moored boats, set on an overcast autumn day with wet reflective surfaces.

scene_state.functional_zone: grassy courtyard between modern glass towers

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through a grassy corridor between two modern glass buildings with autumn foliage

entered.detail: tall contemporary building with exposed structural framework and glass facade
tall modern building with balconies and dark metal facade
young deciduous trees with yellow-green foliage lining the pathway
well-maintained grassy area between the modern buildings

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a narrow grassy corridor flanked by two towering modern glass buildings. Autumn trees with yellowing leaves line the path, and the overcast sky creates a cool, diffused light over the scene.

scene_state.functional_zone: open urban plaza with commercial signage

events.description: ground surface transitions from grass to wet paved stone tiles as the character exits the building corridor into open plaza

agents.ego_description: walking across the open plaza toward the waterfront, passing other pedestrians and commercial signs

notable_agents.action: person standing near a vending machine or information kiosk

entered.detail: wet stone tile surface reflecting the overcast sky and surrounding buildings
tall digital advertisement display with yellow and black graphics
modern black street lighting fixture with curved design

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the building corridor onto a wide paved plaza with wet reflective tiles. Commercial billboards and street lamps become visible as the space opens up, and other pedestrians appear in the distance near the waterfront approach.

events.description: character reaches the waterfront railing revealing the river and moored boats below

agents.ego_description: walking along the waterfront promenade, passing benches and street furniture while observing the river

notable_agents.action: person with red umbrella walking in the opposite direction along the promenade

entered.detail: wide river with choppy brown water under the overcast sky
cluster of houseboats and floating structures docked at the wooden pier
metal safety barrier with horizontal bars along the river edge
park bench with wooden slats and concrete supports facing the water
urban skyline with mix of modern towers and historic buildings across the river

segments.scene_description: The character walks along the waterfront promenade with the river and moored houseboats visible beyond the railing. The wet pavement reflects the grey sky, and park benches line the path as the distant city skyline appears across the water.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a confined urban corridor into an expansive, wet waterfront promenade. It begins with the character walking through a narrow grassy path flanked by towering glass buildings and yellowing autumn trees under a cool, diffused light. As the character emerges from the corridor, the space opens into a wide paved plaza where wet reflective tiles, commercial billboards, and distant pedestrians come into view. The scene then shifts toward the river's edge, following the character along a railing lined with park benches. Finally, the view expands to reveal moored houseboats and a distant city skyline reflecting across the grey water.
